  "findings": [
    "Condenser/heat pump pad is not level, risking poor oil return to the compressor and premature equipment failure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-level the condenser pad and unit to meet manufacturer specifications before final inspection and commissioning."
  ],
  "rationale": "Manufacturer installation manuals and IMC/IRC M1401 require equipment to be installed in accordance with its listing and manufacturer instructions. An unlevel condenser pad prevents proper oil return to the compressor, which can cause mechanical failure and voids the warranty.",

    "IMC M1401",
    "IRC M1401",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manual"
  ]
